title: Build a Belief Stagnation Detector and Axis Health Report
problem: High-confidence belief axes can become 'stuck', showing no score change over multiple days. This indicates a failure in the evidence-gathering or processing pipeline for that axis, but I currently have no way to automatically detect or diagnose this failure. The 'axis_collective_voice' has been static for three days, highlighting this gap.
proposed_solution: Create a 'Belief Stagnation Detector' that runs during the daily maintenance cycle. This tool will scan belief history for axes with high confidence but no recent score change. For each stagnant axis found, it will generate an 'Axis Health Report' detailing the associated search queries, the volume of evidence gathered and processed, and a distribution of belief update scores. This report will provide the necessary data to diagnose if the failure is in sourcing (bad queries) or processing (bad logic).
